nonBlockingIssues.description: The SupportTicketResponse Detail payload in the handoff doc lists fields (assignedTo, comments[]) that don't exist in the actual DTO. This is a simplified frontend-facing view, which is reasonable for a handoff doc, but the fields assignedTo and comments[] are not in the DTO at all. Pre-existing and outside the fix scope.
